summary: charness-owned published Notion gather runtime used by the public gather skill.

detect.failure_hint: Provide `python3` on PATH before using the published Notion gather runtime.

healthcheck.failure_hint: The host lacks a usable Python 3 runtime for published Notion gather.

config_layers.summary: The operator may need to publish the Notion page to the web first.
Use the published-page export helper for public Notion page URLs.

version_expectation.constraint: Prefer the checked-in charness published Notion gather runtime.

host_notes: This support runtime covers published-page gather only.
Private Notion API access remains a separate future capability.
